steps.title: Connect action to result
steps.content: The sentence says Thomas Lee served in the 18th New York Cavalry and then earned a place in US history. The blank should show that the historical recognition resulted from that service.

steps.title: Reject wrong transition types
steps.content: A signals frequency, B signals an example, and C signals a shift or dismissal. The sentence needs a transition meaning that by serving, Lee achieved the result described next. The answer is D.
